question: Top 5 customers by sales
sql: SELECT customers.customer_name AS customer, SUM(orders.amount) AS sales FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id LEFT JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id LEFT JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id LEFT JOIN stores ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id LEFT JOIN sales_reps ON orders.rep_id = sales_reps.rep_id GROUP BY customers.customer_name ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 5

question: Top 10 products by revenue
sql: SELECT products.product_name AS product, SUM(orders.amount) AS sales FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id LEFT JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id LEFT JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id LEFT JOIN stores ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id LEFT JOIN sales_reps ON orders.rep_id = sales_reps.rep_id GROUP BY products.product_name ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top regions by total sales
sql: SELECT customers.region AS region, SUM(orders.amount) AS sales FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id LEFT JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id LEFT JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id LEFT JOIN stores ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id LEFT JOIN sales_reps ON orders.rep_id = sales_reps.rep_id GROUP BY customers.region ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top categories by units sold
sql: SELECT products.category AS category, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS quantity FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id LEFT JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id LEFT JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id LEFT JOIN stores ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id LEFT JOIN sales_reps ON orders.rep_id = sales_reps.rep_id GROUP BY products.category ORDER BY quantity DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top brands by profit
sql: SELECT products.brand AS brand, SUM(order_items.profit) AS profit FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id LEFT JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id LEFT JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id LEFT JOIN stores ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id LEFT JOIN sales_reps ON orders.rep_id = sales_reps.rep_id GROUP BY products.brand ORDER BY profit DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top stores by order value
sql: SELECT stores.store_name AS store, SUM(orders.amount) AS sales FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id LEFT JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id LEFT JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id LEFT JOIN stores ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id LEFT JOIN sales_reps ON orders.rep_id = sales_reps.rep_id GROUP BY stores.store_name ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top sales reps by revenue
sql: SELECT sales_reps.rep_name AS sales_rep, SUM(orders.amount) AS sales FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id LEFT JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id LEFT JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id LEFT JOIN stores ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id LEFT JOIN sales_reps ON orders.rep_id = sales_reps.rep_id GROUP BY sales_reps.rep_name ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top cities by total discount
sql: SELECT customers.city AS city, SUM(order_items.discount) AS discount FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id LEFT JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id LEFT JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id LEFT JOIN stores ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id LEFT JOIN sales_reps ON orders.rep_id = sales_reps.rep_id GROUP BY customers.city ORDER BY discount DESC LIMIT 10

question: Top customer segments by sales
sql: SELECT customers.segment AS customer_segment, SUM(orders.amount) AS sales FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id LEFT JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id LEFT JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id LEFT JOIN stores ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id LEFT JOIN sales_reps ON orders.rep_id = sales_reps.rep_id GROUP BY customers.segment ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 10

training_text: Top states by number of orders

question: Monthly sales trend
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', orders.order_date) AS month, SUM(orders.amount) AS sales FROM orders GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', orders.order_date) ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 100

question: Sales by month
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', orders.order_date) AS month, SUM(orders.amount) AS sales FROM orders GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', orders.order_date) ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 100
